overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player navigates sidewalks and crosswalks beneath towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and industrial ventilation systems, capturing the atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic with wet streets reflecting vibrant artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: starting to walk along the orange textured sidewalk from a bench area under the overpass

pedestrian in red shirt and white pants crossing the street

distinctive orange diamond-plate textured pavement covering the walkway

large illuminated billboard displaying pink and purple neon graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark transit overpass with the camera positioned near a bench where two people are seated. The player starts walking forward along the distinctive orange textured sidewalk, passing black metal safety railings. A pedestrian crosses the street in the mid-ground while neon billboards glow in the distance, establishing the cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the orange sidewalk, the player passes a speed limit sign and trash receptacle while approaching a major intersection. The camera pans up to reveal towering buildings, including a distinctive structure with large ventilation fans. The overhead bridge becomes visible to the left as the player moves forward, with neon billboards growing larger in the field of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering cyberpunk architecture and holographic displays

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the asphalt street crosswalk
looks straight up at the towering building with bright neon signage and ventilation fans

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street while looking up at the neon-lit skyscrapers and industrial architecture

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto the street crosswalk, moving through a wide intersection dominated by a massive building featuring large circular ventilation fans and towering neon billboards. The camera tilts upward to capture the scale of the cyberpunk architecture, with bright artificial lights reflecting off the wet pavement. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the player crosses.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with holographic advertisements and traffic

events.description: pedestrian walk signal activates projecting green WALK text onto the crosswalk
follows a pedestrian across the wide intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the major intersection following a woman in white pants, with the WALK sign illuminated on the ground

segments.scene_description: Crossing the major intersection, the player follows a woman in white pants across the yellow-striped crosswalk. A green WALK sign is projected onto the ground, and a red truck waits at the corner. The scene is bustling with moderate pedestrian density, and the massive ventilation building recedes into the left background as the player approaches the far sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk continuing past commercial buildings with neon signage

events.description: steps up onto the far sidewalk after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various pedestrians and street furniture in the urban environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall pole with illuminated walk/don't walk signals and crossing buttons
cluster of illuminated signs and billboards visible down the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player steps onto the far sidewalk and continues walking past a concrete building facade and pedestrian signal posts. The street continues into the distance with more neon signage visible ahead, while the massive ventilation building remains visible in the far left background. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the orange textured pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadows of a transit overpass into the heart of a towering, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by moving along an orange textured sidewalk past a bench and metal railings, with distant billboards glowing through the dark city air. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal massive skyscrapers and industrial ventilation fans that loom overhead, shifting the perspective upward to capture the scale of the architecture. The scene then transitions into a wide, wet intersection where the camera follows a pedestrian across yellow-striped crosswalks beneath projected green walk signs and the glare of artificial lights. Finally, the camera steps onto the far sidewalk, leaving the massive ventilation building behind in the distance as it continues forward past concrete facades and sparse pedestrians into the neon-drenched street.
